levels.title: NP Membership Benefits
benefits: No membership fee for nonprofit organizations.
Includes chamber updates, community event invitations, and networking opportunities.

levels.title: Bronze Membership Benefits
benefits: Members receive chamber updates and local business networking event invitations.

levels.title: Silver Membership Benefits
benefits: Members receive training invitations, event discounts, and selected advertising options.

levels.title: Gold Membership Benefits
benefits: Members receive priority spotlight positions, special event promotion, and premium advertising.
